info.title: Jungle Scout API
info.description: Jungle Scout provides Amazon product research, keyword research, and sales analytics. The API follows JSON:API 1.0 format and provides access to Product Database, Keywords, Share of Voice, Sales Estimates, Product Tracker, Niche Scout, and more.

post.description: Search Amazon products with various filters like categories, keywords, price range, sales, reviews, etc.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending

post.description: Find Amazon keywords based on seed keywords. Returns search volume, trend, PPC costs, and more.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending

post.description: Find keywords associated with one or more ASINs. Returns organic rank, search volume, and more.

Get tracked product data for ASINs that you are monitoring.
